name: cognimesh
description: CogniMesh - Multimodal Cognitive Data Mesh & Marketplace

scripts.test: npm run test:e2e && npm run test:vaquar && npm run test:pvdm && npm run test:integrity-gate -- contracts/examples/structured-cdc-pipeline.yaml
scripts.test:unit: node --test lib/contract-builder/__tests__/contract-builder.test.js lib/contract-builder/__tests__/graph-to-workflow.test.js lib/integrity-gate/__tests__/integrity-gate.test.js lib/__tests__/safe-yaml-catalog.test.js lib/__tests__/lineage-schema.test.js lib/__tests__/pvdm-failure.test.js lib/__tests__/vrp-security.test.js lib/__tests__/vrp-verify.test.js lib/__tests__/decision-attestation.test.js lib/__tests__/schema-migration.test.js lib/__tests__/tracing-alerting.test.js lib/__tests__/load-env.test.js lib/__tests__/ai-pipeline-designer.test.js lib/__tests__/execution-observability.test.js lib/__tests__/aws-design-review.test.js lib/aws/__tests__/stepfunctions-deploy.test.js lib/platform/__tests__/agent-deploy.test.js lib/platform/__tests__/platform.test.js lib/vaquar/__tests__/pvdm-sfn.test.js services/api-gateway/__tests__/api-gateway.test.js
scripts.lint: eslint lib services scripts portal/src services/api-gateway --ext .js,.jsx
scripts.lint:fix: eslint lib services scripts portal/src services/api-gateway --ext .js,.jsx --fix
scripts.test:lambda-zips: node infra/terraform/scripts/package-lambda.js all && node scripts/test-lambda-zip.js infra/terraform/build/integrity-gate.zip && node scripts/test-lambda-zip.js infra/terraform/build/domain-writer.zip
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,portal,catalog -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:portal" "npm run dev:catalog"
scripts.dev:minimal: concurrently -n api,portal -c cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:portal"
